case_title: PARKER HARRISON, DDS VS BROWN CLARA NAVE MRS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,030.00 FILED BY PARKER HARRISON, DDS AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN CLARA NAVE MRS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN CLARA NAVE MRS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF PARKER HARRISON, DDS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BROWN CLARA NAVE MRS. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PARKER HARRISON, DDS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKER HARRISON, DDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN CLARA NAVE MRS. $1,030.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,043.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BROWN CLARA NAVE MRS. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PARKER HARRISON, DDS DEFECT IN SERVICE WAIVED BY PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN CLARA NAVE MRS.
